title: Gobby ghook --diagnose output
description: Output of `ghook --diagnose --cli=<c> --type=<t>`. Schema version 2 — adds install_method and install_source_url for install-provenance reporting. v1 fields are unchanged.

install_method.description: How ghook was installed, sourced from the install sidecar (.ghook-install.json) next to the binary. Conventional values: github-release, crates-binstall, cargo-install, manual, unknown. null when no sidecar is present (e.g. cargo install without a sidecar-writing installer).

install_source_url.description: URL the binary was fetched from (typically a GitHub release asset URL), sourced from the install sidecar. null when unknown or not applicable.
